emails.subject: FW: Follow Up Meeting
emails.body: John here is a note from Jane about some things Marketiing wants to talk about at our mtg. Thanks Lynn Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Follow Up Meeting
emails.body: RE: Follow Up Meeting Lynn, are you still going? JWB

emails.subject: Re: FW: Follow Up Meeting
emails.body: Re: FW: Follow Up Meeting Lynn, are you going to be able to attend the meeting? I also just received my Blackberry cooool. JWB Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: Re: FW: Follow Up Meeting
emails.body: John, if the meeting is Monday I have jury duty. What did you and Ava decide to do? I'll call you in the morning. Thanks Lynn Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL> Sent: Wed Oct 24 15:19:50 2001

emails.subject: RE: Follow Up Meeting
emails.body: John this message concens me. Did you talk to Ava this Morninv? I'll call you in the morning. Lynn Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Follow Up Meeting
emails.body: Lynn, The meeting is set up for Monday the 29th. If you want me to change it to the 30th I can or I can go alone, remember I am out starting the 31st. Ava did not tell me you had Jury duty until after the flight had been booked.
